channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Desert Tweaks
item.description: small set of tweaks for a desert survival server

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: Simple Water Tweaks VSR patch
item.description: Adds compatibility between Simple Water Tweaks and various shader mods

item.title: Hide UI Temporal Gear
item.description: Hides the default UI gear indicator for temporal stability

item.title: StabilityLock
item.description: Locks player stability at maximum value. Works to reset stability if activated then deactivated.

item.title: Fast Travel NPC
item.description: Allows players to fast travel in the world by paying rusty gears.

item.title: No Indoor Fog Fix
item.description: Get rid of fog in your home! Increases fog distance from your camera when you are "indoors"

item.title: Transform Designer | Improved TFEdit
item.description: 3D Gizmos for TFEditing. No more computer numerical control era UI tools!

item.title: Better Pyrolysis
item.description: Adds several new features regarding pyrolyzing different fuels.

item.title: Riley's Classes
item.description: Addon for Aldi's Classes, makes classes interact with other mods and adds new ones!

item.title: More Fat From Animals
item.description: Increases the ammount of fat received when harvesting animals

item.title: Boric Alchemy
item.description: Boric Alchemy adds chemical routes to create and refine resources, and create alchemical marvels!

item.title: Project Merezha - Client Preview
item.description: Early client support for an upcoming Vintage Story multiplayer games network.

item.title: Dense Ground Storage
item.description: Place down more items per block and on chiseled blocks

item.title: KRPG Enchantment
item.description: Adds MC-like enchantment system to VS.

item.title: Atlas
item.description: Integration testing for mods: xUnit scenarios against a real headless server, in your IDE and CI

item.title: server tweaks
item.description: for vintagereborn

item.title: Riley's Patches
item.description: Riley's Patches

item.title: Animalica - Foxes, Wolves & Hyenas
item.description: Adds Foxes, Wolves, and Hyenas as player choices!

item.title: Riley's Classes No Negatives
item.description: Removes negative traits from Aldi's/Riley's Classes

item.title: AFK Module
item.description: Kick players who is afk for too long

item.title: Ghaelen's Tweaks
item.description: My personal tweaks I like to play with.

item.title: Dar's Server Utilities
item.description: Combines my mods with the intent to be used specifically on Sundered Isles Server

item.title: Runic Armory
item.description: Adds runic textures to combat overhauls Armory mod!

item.title: Immersive Third Person Camera
item.description: Smoothly changes third-person camera positions, improving player immersion in the world

item.title: Falx To Katana
item.description: Killing with a Falx has no honour in it, but this does.

item.title: (Not) Just Tofu
item.description: Simple, realistic tofu & miso making process for better vegan protein & dairy food and meal options.

item.title: Projectile Tracker
item.description: A QoL mod that automatically creates and deletes waypoints for projectiles you fire.

item.title: Mad Fathers Matter
item.description: Children inherit the highest generation of either parent instead of just the mother.

item.title: IRDP's Wet Crops Mod
item.description: Adding a few new moisture-heavy crops to the game. Compat with Paddy Fields.
